note: Internal planning data for Aries Mission Control. This file is allowed to hold human planning state, but it must never be treated as runtime telemetry.

tasks.title: Fix repair sweep launcher entrypoint
dependencies: Confirm the valid Lobster pipeline or skill entrypoint for the repair sweep
tasks.nextAction: Inspect the current repair sweep launcher and replace the invalid workflow path with a verified runnable entrypoint.

tasks.title: Stabilize model auth / billing failures affecting overnight jobs
dependencies: Verify fallback model behavior for cron runs
tasks.nextAction: Audit why cron runs reported auth and billing failures despite current model status now showing usable provider profiles.
tasks.description: Recent cron failures include OpenAI Codex token refresh and Venice billing errors. Those failures need a verified runtime explanation and fix path.

tasks.title: Configure Git identity for private repo backup automation
dependencies: Confirm the intended Git author name and email for host-side backup commits
tasks.nextAction: Set repo or host Git identity so backup commits can run without failing on user.name / user.email.
tasks.description: Private repo backup jobs are repeatedly failing at git commit because author identity is not configured in the execution environment.

Keep execution planning data separate from telemetry

tasks.title: Expand Lobster / TaskFlow visibility once a live history source is verified
tasks.blockerReason: Current `openclaw tasks flow list --json` source returns zero flows; no separate Lobster history source has been verified yet.
dependencies: Find a verified Lobster run history source beyond the current empty TaskFlow list
